subject: Quick question about the proposal
body: Hi {{OWNER_FIRST_NAME}}, just wanted to follow up on the proposal you sent last week. Do you have a few minutes this week to walk through the pricing tiers? Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon would work for me. Thanks, Sarah
notes: follow-up on outstanding quote, customer asking to schedule

subject: RFQ Reply — Project Aurora
body: Dear Sir, Please find attached our quotation for Project Aurora. Part SKU-1192: $42 unit, MOQ 500, lead time 12 weeks. Part SKU-1193: $58 unit, MOQ 250, lead time 10 weeks. Best regards, Wei
notes: standard vendor RFQ response with line items

subject: New project inquiry - hospitality client
body: Hello, we are designing a hotel lobby installation in Miami and need to source some custom panel work. Roughly 200 sq m, completion target Q4. Can you send some options? Marcus Webb, Webb Design Studio
notes: new inbound inquiry, missing budget + spec detail

subject: Re: PO confirmation
body: {{OWNER_FIRST_NAME}}, confirmed receipt of PO 4421. We will ship in two batches per your request. Tracking to follow. Best, Elena
notes: routine order confirmation, no action needed

subject: Following up
body: Hi {{OWNER_FIRST_NAME}}, noticed your company on LinkedIn and thought you might benefit from our lead generation services. Free trial available. Want to hop on a 15 min call? Jamie
notes: cold outreach from unknown sender, lead-gen pitch

subject: URGENT: Pricing approval needed
body: {{OWNER_FIRST_NAME}} we have a deal closing tomorrow but the customer is pushing back on the proposed price by 12%. Can you approve a discount or should we hold the line? Need to know by EOD.
notes: internal team needs pricing decision only owner can make

subject: Quote follow-up - 3 weeks out
body: Hello, checking in on the quote from three weeks ago. Our client is reviewing options - any chance you can resend the spec sheet you mentioned? Best, Diana
notes: customer following up on stale quote, requesting more info

subject: Meeting recap + action items
body: Good meeting today. Action items: 1) {{OWNER_FIRST_NAME}} to send updated pricing by Friday 2) I will follow up with vendor on lead time 3) Joint follow-up with customer next week. Talk soon, Mike
notes: internal meeting recap, owner has explicit action item but already known

subject: Newsletter — Industry trends Q2
body: This month in the industry: new regulations, market shifts, supplier consolidation. Read more at our website.
notes: industry newsletter, low value, can be skipped

subject: WIN $10,000 NOW - CLAIM YOUR PRIZE
body: CONGRATULATIONS! You have been selected to receive a cash prize. Click here to claim immediately!!!
notes: obvious spam, foreign domain, lottery scam pattern

subject: Sample delivery confirmation
body: Samples delivered today at 14:30 to your warehouse. Signed by reception. Tracking: 1Z9999W99999999999
notes: automated delivery notification, no follow-up required

subject: Discussion on Phase 2 expansion
body: {{OWNER_FIRST_NAME}}, I would like to discuss expanding our agreement to Phase 2. We are looking at +40% volume next year. Can we set up a call next week? My availability: Mon 10-12, Wed 2-4. Catherine
notes: known customer with explicit expansion ask, ready for owner-voice draft

subject: Question about specs document
body: Hi {{OWNER_FIRST_NAME}}, the specs document you sent has a discrepancy on page 4 - it lists two different MOQ values. Which one is correct? Thanks, Roger
notes: customer pointing out doc error, needs answer

subject: Lunch?
body: Hey {{OWNER_FIRST_NAME}}, free for lunch Thursday? - Eva
notes: casual internal lunch invite, low priority

subject: Re: project status (audio note attached)
body: See voice memo - thoughts on the Davies project timeline shift.
notes: self-forward with audio attachment, route to audio-note handler
